summaryItinerary: Day 1 (24th May): Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
Day 2 (25th May): Ha Noi – Join Group Day Tour to Ninh Binh (Hoa Lu Ancient Citadel – Trang An Boating) (No meal)
Day 3 (26th May): Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise (Local Lunch)
Day 4 (27th May): Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town (No meal)
Day 5 (28th May): Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (No meal)
Day 6 (29th May): Da Nang – Free Leisure (No meal)
Day 7 (30th May): Da Nang Departure (No meal)

detailedItinerary.day: Day 1: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
details: Arrive in Ha Noi, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
12:30 – 13:30: Visit Tran Quoc Pagoda located on Golden Fish Island in West Lake. It is the oldest pagoda in Hanoi built in the 6th century.

14:30: Continue to visit Temple of Literature – the first university of Vietnam, The Temple of Literature (Van Mieu Quoc Tu Giam) is one of the most attractive tourist spots in Northern Vietnam. The Temple of Literature was founded in 1070.

15:30: Keep going to visit Hoa Lo Prison, the prison was built by the French, from 1886 to 1901, when Vietnam was still a part of French Indochina. The French called the prison Maison Centrale. The prison was called “A Hell on Earth” and now the prison is like a war museum for those who want to understand more about the war against France of Vietnamese people.
16:30: Our bus will take you back to the hotel for check-in.
Free leisure and overnight in Ha Noi City

detailedItinerary.day: Day 2: Ha Noi – Join Group Day Tour to Ninh Binh (Hoa Lu Ancient Citadel – Trang An Boating) (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi – Join Group Day Tour to Ninh Binh (Hoa Lu Ancient Citadel – Trang An Boating) (No meal)
details: 7:00: Our tour guide will pick you up from your hotel. We take you to Ninh Binh province which is far from Hanoi city about 120 km.
9:00: Have a short break for 20 minutes to relax

10:30: The first destination in this trip is visit Hoa Lu Ancient Capital. This is the first capital of Vietnam. Come to visit Hoa Lu, you will learn about why the capital was moved to Hanoi nowadays. You are impressed on an outstanding architecture when entering temples of King Dinh and King Le, the first and second emperors of ancient Vietnam, built in the 17 centuries. Try to feel ancient atmospheres in Hoa Lu ancient capital.
11:30: Continue the tour with 45 minutes for cycling around the village to discover the life of local people.
12:30: Take a short break.

13:30 – 14:00: Visit Trang An which was recognized by UNESCO as the world Heritage Site in 2014. Trang An has the wonderful tunnel cave system so that Kong’s Movie Group chose this place for New Version of Kong in 2016 – “Skull Island “. Boat trip to visit Trang An to see the amazing beauty of this landscape with many caves such as: Sang Cave (Light Cave), Toi Cave (Dack cave), Nau Ruou Cave (Cooking Wine), green river and natural view.
16:30: Get on the Bus to return to Hanoi
Arrive to Hanoi and get drop off at the Hotel.
Overnight in Ha Noi

detailedItinerary.day: Day 3: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise (Lunch)
detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise (Lunch)
details: 7:30-7:45: Our driver will pick you up at hotel to depart for Halong Bay
Our journey follows the Hanoi – Haiphong - Tuan Chau Highway
On the way, we stop for a short break for 30 minutes to relax
11:45: Arrive at Tuan Chau Harbor, get on Luxury Cruise with our crew’s warm welcome
Enjoy the welcome drink then start the excursion to discover the beauty of the world heritage site
12:30: Enjoy Vietnamese lunch on the boat. While having lunch, the boat will pass by the beautiful scenery on both sides with thousands of the limestone.
14:00: Arrive at Bo Hon Island, and you will visit Sung Sot Cave – the most beautiful cave with a lot of stalagmites and stalactites
14:45: Do kayaking or bamboo boating through Luon Cave to discover the beautiful lagoon.
15:15: Visit TiTop Island with its sandy beach. You can go swimming here or trek up to the top of the island for sightseeing all of Halong Bay
16:30: Back to the boat for the sunset party (with wine, tea, fruits, and biscuits), meanwhile, the boat is cruising back to the harbor
18:00 – 18:15: Arrive back to the harbor. Get on the bus and return to Hanoi
21:00: Get dropped off at the hotel.
Overnight in Ha Noi

detailedItinerary.day: Day 4: Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town (No meal)
details: Do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you to the Noi Bai International Airport as your departure flight to Da Nang City
Arrive in Da Nang City, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Do hotel check-in at 14:00 PM

15:15 - 15:45: Our driver and guide pick you up from your hotel, we will visit Ngu Hanh Son (Marble Mountain) Marble Mountain is a complex consisting of Kim (Iron Mountain), Mộc (Wood Mountain), Thủy (Water Mountain), Hỏa (Fire Mountain), Thổ (Earth Mountain) symbolizing for 5 main elements of the universe in Asia Culture. You will discover the mysterious beauty of caves combining the sacred atmosphere of Buddhism. Visiting Tam Thai Pagoda, Linh Ung Pagoda.
You will admire the masterpieces of exquisite stone sculptures created by the skilful hands of artisans in Non Nuoc village at the foot of the mountain.
18:00: Depart to Hoi An Ancient Town.

Visit Hoi An Acient Town, with: Japanese Bridge: This only remain of Japanses culture is now considered as a symbol of Hoi An. Taking a walk on the street along the Hoai River, enjoy the night life of Hoi An Town. Colorful lanterns are hung on in front of the houses, across the streets and paths all around the town, which is going to make you feel peaceful, serene and want to last this walk forever.
21:00 Drop off at your hotel.
Overnight in Da Nang

detailedItinerary.day: Day 5: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (No meal)
details: 07:30 - 08:30: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel, depart for Ba Na Hill through one of the most beautiful seaside streets of Central Vietnam.

09:00: Arrive in Ba Na, you will have a chance to experience the two – UNESCO - record cable system up to the top of the hill and enjoy the beautiful sight of Mo stream, Toc Tien waterfall with the impressive dazzling white spume.
Sightseeing on Ba Na Hill to:
Hand of the gods hold Vietnam’s Golden Bridge.
L’Jardin Zone with French Architecture Building: Tinh Tâm Garden, French Stable, one hundred-year-old pomelo tree, Old Villas.
Linh Ung Pagoda, 27 meters Buddha Statue, Loc Uyen Garden.
11:30: From Debay station, you will get on the second cable system to move to Nui Chua Peak – the rooftop of Da nang City.
Continue the tour with Fantasy Park – one of the most modern indoor game centers of the Asia.
Visit Chua Linh Tu Temple, enjoy a panoramic view of the whole Da Nang city and Da Nang Bay through the mist in a romantic afternoon on Ba Na peak.
Go down by the cable system. Get on coach and return the city centre.
17:00 -17:30: Drop off at your hotel.
Free leisure and overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.day: Day 6: Da Nang – Free Leisure (No meal)
detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang – Free Leisure (No meal)
details: You will have free leisure day
Overnight in Da Nang

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang Departure (No meal)
details: Do hotel check-out before 12:00 PM
Our driver will take you directly to the Da Nang International Airport as your departure flight
TOUR ENDS.
Thank you for booking with us!

Roundtrip transport Ha Noi - Ha Long by Shuttle Bus without guide

Water in tours: 1 bottle of 500ml/person/day tour
Tours and Transfer are on Sharing Basic with good condition coach and local guide speaking English
excludes: 06 nights accommodation at standard room in hotel with daily breakfast
Accommodation in Ha Noi, Da Nang
Surcharge for transportation and SIC Tours if hotel is not located Ha Noi Old Quarter, Da Nang City – Beach Center
Wax Museum, Debay Wine Cellar, Alpine Coaster, 10D Cinema, Climbing games, and prize-winning games with coin in Ba Na Hills
Drink on Cruise, during Meals and Surcharge for Beverages brought on Cruise
Other meals and services than mentioned
Laundry, telephone calls and expenditure of a personal nature
Early check-in and late check-out at all hotels

Surcharge for peak season: Hung Kings' Festival (26th April, 2026), Vietnam's Reunification Day and International Labor Day Holidays (30th April - 01st May, 2026), Independence Day (01st – 02nd Sep, 2026), Christmas Holidays (24th– 25th Dec, 2026), Da Nang's International Firework Festival 2026 (29 – 30 May, 05 – 06 Jun, 12 – 13 Jun, 19 – 20 Jun, 26 – 27 Jun, 10 - 11 July, 2026)
